params.name: Energy Missile
params.description:
On Aug 19, 3022 AD, the Energy Missile was completed.
The Energy Missile is an expensive explosive ordnance that packs a punch. It boasts a powerful shield generator and multifunctional guidance system, allowing it to automatically lock onto targets while being protected by an all-around energy shield. It can also be operated manually in special situations. When equipped with a proton-scattering warhead, it can unleash a devastatingly powerful blast that outmatches even a starfighter.
